writers.lyricist: Camila Cabello/Pharrell Williams/Ali Tamposi/Brian Lee/Andrew Watt/Louis Bell/Kaan Gunesberk
writers.composer: Camila Cabello/Pharrell Williams/Frank Dukes/Starrah/Brian Lee/Andrew Watt/Louis Bell/Kaan Gunesberk

lyrics.translation: 哈瓦那 哦呐呐

lyrics.text: Half of my heart is in Havana, ooh-na-na (ayy, ayy)
lyrics.translation: 我一半的心都留在哈瓦那

lyrics.text: He took me back to East Atlanta, na-na-na
lyrics.translation: 他带我重回东亚特兰大

lyrics.text: All of my heart is in Havana (ayy)
lyrics.translation: 我的所有身心如今都属于哈瓦那
还有一些关于他一举一动的小心思
哈瓦那 哦呐呐

lyrics.text: He didn't walk up with that "how you doin'?"
lyrics.translation: 他没有向我走来 没有一句最近安好的问候
当他走进房间

lyrics.text: He said there’s a lot of girls I can do with
lyrics.translation: 他说 他可以搞定的女孩太多
但我不能离开你的陪伴

lyrics.text: I'm doin' forever in a minute
lyrics.translation: 这一分钟仿佛有一世纪那么漫长
那个六月的夏夜

lyrics.text: And papa says he got malo in him
lyrics.translation: 我父亲说那男孩体内有恶魔隐藏（malo在西班牙语中是evil的意思 ）
但他感觉澎湃

lyrics.text: Oooh-oooh-ooh, I knew it when I met him
lyrics.translation: 喔喔喔 在第一次邂逅时我便已知晓

lyrics.text: I loved him when I left him
lyrics.translation: 在离开他后我会不顾一切爱上他
这种感觉就像

lyrics.text: Oooh-oooh-ooh, and then I had to tell him
lyrics.translation: 喔喔喔 我却不得不告诉他

lyrics.text: I had to go, oh na-na-na-na-na
lyrics.translation: 我必须要走了 哦呐呐呐
哈瓦那 哦呐呐

lyrics.text: Half of my heart is in Havana, ooh-na-na (ayy, ayy)
lyrics.translation: 我一半的心都留在哈瓦那

lyrics.text: He took me back to East Atlanta, na-na-na (uh huh)
lyrics.translation: 他带我重回东亚特兰大

lyrics.text: All of my heart is in Havana (ayy)
lyrics.translation: 我的所有身心如今都属于哈瓦那
我的身心如今都属于哈瓦那
哈瓦那 哦呐呐
（Young Thug原名）

lyrics.text: Just graduated, fresh on campus, mmm
lyrics.translation: 毕业 又是大学的新生

lyrics.text: Fresh out East Atlanta with no manners, damn
lyrics.translation: 新秀们冲入东亚特兰大 不要拘于礼节
冲入东亚特兰大

lyrics.text: Bump on her bumper like a traffic jam (jam)
lyrics.translation: 交通堵塞 在她的车后保险杠上迎面一撞

lyrics.text: Hey, I was quick to pay that girl like Uncle Sam (here you go, ayy)
lyrics.translation: 我像山姆老爹一样快速付好了她的赔偿

lyrics.text: Back it on me, shawty cravin' on me
lyrics.translation: 回到我身边 那女孩开始渴望我

lyrics.text: Get to diggin' on me (on me)
lyrics.translation: 开始沉醉于我
她为我等待

lyrics.text: Shawty cakin' on me, got the bacon on me (wait up)
lyrics.translation: 甜心辣妹在我身上，拿着培根

lyrics.text: This is history in the makin' on me (on me)
lyrics.translation: 这将是她与我的不朽情史

lyrics.text: Point blank, close range, that be
lyrics.translation: 空白点 越来越近的关系

lyrics.text: If it cost a million, that's me (that's me)
lyrics.translation: 不惜为她花上百万钞票 那就是我

lyrics.text: I was gettin' mula, man they feel me
lyrics.translation: 富可敌国的我 她迟早会爱上我（mula在俚语中是money的意思）
哈瓦那 哦呐呐

lyrics.text: Half of my heart is in Havana, ooh-na-na (oh, ayy, ayy)
lyrics.translation: 我一半的心都留在哈瓦那

lyrics.text: He took me back to East Atlanta, na-na-na (oh no)
lyrics.translation: 他带我重回东亚特兰大

lyrics.text: All of my heart is in Havana (ayy)
lyrics.translation: 我的所有身心如今都属于哈瓦那
我的身心如今都属于哈瓦那
哈瓦那 哦呐呐
带我回去 带我回去
带我回去 带我回去
带我回去 带我回去
带我回去 带我回去

lyrics.text: Take me back to my Havana...
lyrics.translation: 带我回到我甜蜜的哈瓦那
哈瓦那 哦呐呐

lyrics.text: Half of my heart is in Havana, ooh-na-na (yeah)
lyrics.translation: 我一半的心都留在哈瓦那

lyrics.text: He took me back to East Atlanta, na-na-na
lyrics.translation: 他带我重回东亚特兰大

lyrics.text: All of my heart is in Havana
lyrics.translation: 我的所有身心如今都属于哈瓦那
我的身心如今都属于哈瓦那
哈瓦那 哦呐呐

lyrics.text: No, no, no, take me back
lyrics.translation: 不不不 带我回去吧
哈瓦那 哦呐呐
